planted_risks.risk: Legal review turnaround of 15 working days versus the 5 days assumed in the schedule
Celebrity spokesperson reputation risk given a history of public controversies
Weather risk, coastal filming in February during storm season
Media buy committed and paid before the creative concept was validated, and focus group feedback was mixed
Sponsor risk, the CMO championing the campaign leaves at the end of January
Governance risk, three agencies collaborating with no agreed decision making process
Offshore fixed bid microsite build while requirements are still changing weekly
Fixed multi channel go live date of 3 March with dependencies across TV, out of home, and digital
